title: TRON announced the launch of the TRX/USDC trading pair on Aerodrome, the leading decentralized exchange on Base
message_html: TRON announced the launch of the TRX/USDC trading pair on Aerodrome, the leading decentralized exchange on Base ...
snippet: TRON DAO (@trondao): TRON announced the launch of the TRX/USDC trading pair on @AerodromeFi, the leading decentralized exchange (DEX) on @base. This brings TRX, the native utility token of the TRON network, into Base’s rapidly expanding decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem through @LayerZero_Core'
